caption: Two men sit side-by-side in a room with a wooden-slatted wall behind them, which holds several shelves of DVDs. Above them, a screen displays the yellow text "OUR STUPID REACTIONS". The man on the left, with short graying hair and wearing a dark green t-shirt, is identified by on-screen text as "@RICKSEGALL". The man on the right, with reddish hair and a beard, wearing a gray t-shirt and a necklace, is identified as "@KORBINMILES". A small "PATREON" logo appears between them. Throughout the sequence, the men are engaged in a conversation. The man on the left gestures with his hands while speaking, shifting from an open-handed motion to a more focused gesture. The man on the right reacts by placing his hand on his head, then resting his finger against his temple, and finally bringing his hand to his chin in a thoughtful pose.
